title: neoachmandra filipes
intro: Neoachmandra filipes, also known as the 'Monkey's Claw', is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae and is native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Neoachmandra filipes lie in its leaves and roots, which are used to treat various health conditions due to their antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate pain, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Neoachmandra filipes are typically dried, crushed, and made into teas or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
